finding: coaching/alerts POST fails open on unset CRON_SECRET + non-constant-time compare (route.ts:36-40)
No per-route error.tsx on live-data route groups (heatmap/terminal/grid/nighthawk) -> any panel render crash whites out entire app shell
UW WebSocket has zero multi-replica guard (no SETNX leader) -> 5x joins vs 2-RPS cap + unbounded persist fan-out; masked at ~2 replicas, breaks first at horizontal scale

SPX play ledger empty all-time (spx_open_play=0, spx_play_outcomes=0). EXPECTED not bug: fetch-fix 6f00a5e merged ~20min after Fri RTH close; no post-fix session has run. WATCH Mon 2026-06-29 RTH. CTO filed as P0-1; deep-audit reclassified P2-C after git-timing check

recordPlayEntry write failure swallowed (try/catch console.error only, spx-play-engine.ts:915-927) + force-close without outcome row (db.ts:1234-1238) -> a real win/loss can show as never-happened. Genuine code bug independent of the veto fix
reconcileAllMemberships O(users) serial network I/O, no advisory lock, no concurrency bound (membership.ts:210-291) -> times out + races Clerk/Whop entitlement writes across replicas at scale
Polygon leader-lock refresh bare expire() no ownership check, constant value (polygon-socket.ts:149-154) -> GC pause >25s lets two live index sockets coexist
Polygon connect-throw does not release leader lock/flag (polygon-socket.ts:405-409) -> a replica with failing WS construct holds lock forever, starves whole cluster index feed
uw-socket flow_alerts handler does void persistAndPublishFlowAlert per alert with no concurrency bound (uw-socket.ts:592-615) -> open-bell burst = unbounded pending promises on heap
options-socket optionMarks.set never deleted on unsubscribe (options-socket.ts:443) -> monotonic in-memory growth across expiries on long-lived replica
Telemetry read-path per-replica in-memory (api-telemetry.ts:39-42) -> admin dashboard sees 1/N of traffic, rate-limit counts fragmented
Cross-replica cache split-brain on Redis outage (shared-cache.ts:81-143) -> 5 replicas serve divergent GEX walls/tape >=30s with no alarm
Schema-failure re-init stampede (db.ts:663-674) -> on transient DB blip every concurrent caller re-enters createPool() amplifying load on a down DB; needs backoff

spx-desk-merge module-singleton lastGoodStructure read-modify-write per request (spx-desk-merge.ts:82-220) -> concurrent requests cross-contaminate structure levels; grounding hole on a 100%-correct surface

W1 dual per-ticker GEX path: Largo get_positioning + Night Hawk dossier use fetchPolygonPositioningBundle while Heatmap + Night's Watch use fetchGexHeatmap -> same math, different strike-banding+caches can name different call/put wall for same non-SPX ticker. STANDING

W2 Night's Watch panel verdict omits HELIX flows: buildPositionContextMap leaves flows unset (position-context.ts:59-76) so panel Hold/Trim/Sell never fires flow signal; only detail view does. STANDING
W3 Grid /api/grid/economy (readGridEconomy, UW) vs SPX desk mergeMacroEventsToday use two different macro calendars that can disagree on dates/labels. NEW
API auth enforced by self-guard convention only (middleware.ts:12-17) -> one forgotten requireTierApi = open premium/Anthropic-spend endpoint; no default-deny, no lint/test
/api/market/anomalies (200 empty) and /api/market/regime (200 empty) serve unauthenticated while sibling market routes 401 -> would leak once they return real payloads
spx_signal_log last wrote 2026-06-17 (10 days stale) -> any admin/analytics reader serves stale signals; confirm superseded or retire
spx_pulse_snapshots + spx_watch_setups: 0 rows all-time, zero INSERT code refs -> dead/legacy tables, drop or wire writers
16,693 seq scans on 0-row spx_play_outcomes (UI polling empty table); resolves once ledger populates
FK columns without index: play_candidates.scan_run_id, play_cards.candidate_id, play_outcomes.play_card_id, playbook_tracked_positions.* -> slow JOINs once tables fill; add pre-fill
api_telemetry_events 305MB write-only (123k rows/day = 4x the code's 30k estimate); dashboard reads memory not this table -> sample writes or drop durable copy
GEX cache-miss fans out ~88 concurrent far-dated fetches (polygon-options-gex.ts:1968); don't 429 (limiter) but queue ahead of live desk reads in warm-cron window -> cap/de-prioritize far-dated
GexHeatmap 187KB static import + recharts ships synchronously into heatmap first-load JS (Heatmap.tsx:3) -> use next/dynamic ssr:false
api/engine/health statically cached (no force-dynamic, route.ts:4) -> serves build-time health snapshot, never probes live
LiveMarketPulse 3s / GexHeatmap quote 1.5s poll 24/7 with no isRTH() gating -> full-rate polling market-closed (Redis-cached so cost is Next-layer compute/bandwidth not provider)
db.ts TLS rejectUnauthorized:false default for non-Railway hosts (db.ts:38-46) -> MITM-able if DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL moves off Railway
X-Powered-By: Next.js header leaking (minor info disclosure) -> set poweredByHeader:false in next.config

Audit SKILLs use stale probe paths (spx-pulse, /api/flows, nighthawk/latest-edition, grid/news), wrong env names (UNUSUAL_WHALES_API_KEY vs UW_API_KEY), and a pool.on regex that misses livePool.on -> false P0/P1 every run. Independently rediscovered by 4 separate audit crons this cycle
